description: Fast-mode exact-first 70% K7/no-QJL Shmoosh policy for the first self-attention transformer block in each up_blocks.0 attention group of the local Underpaint Juggernaut SDXL checkpoint. This variant keeps packed_t codes but uses Triton tf32 dot precision.

validation.candidate_reason: TF32 dot precision roughly halves synthetic packed-attention time for K7/no-QJL packed_t self-attention, with a small image-fidelity cost on the hardest 1024 case.
validation.note: Keep the ieee packed_t policy as the high-fidelity default. Use this tf32 policy as an explicit 4070 fast mode until broader image and 3080 validation decide whether the PSNR tax is acceptable by default.
